name: Omakase (お任せ)
short_description: Omakase is a relaxing cooking and creation game. Slice, mix, and explore new ingredients while completing quests. Customize your display to your liking, crafting unique compositions of ingredients and objects. There's no pressure; unwind and enjoy the culinary art at your own pace.
detailed_description: Immerse yourself in the relaxing culinary art of Omakase. Slice, mix, and discover new ingredients while completing quests and leveling up. Customize your own display with beautifully arranged ingredients, and compete online to showcase who’s the top chef. With its cozy and creative style, Omakase lets you enjoy the process at your own pace while crafting delightful pieces.
about_the_game: Immerse yourself in the relaxing culinary art of Omakase. Slice, mix, and discover new ingredients while completing quests and leveling up.
